questionHtml: Sketch the curve of y=fx for 0≤x≤π, taking into consideration the relative values of the second derivative found in part (b).
markschemeHtml:
A1A1A1

Note: Award A1 for general shape, A1 for correct maxima 0,e,π,e and minimum point π2, 1e and A1 for showing a higher rate of change of gradient at maxima and a lower rate of change of gradient at the minimum point.

[3 marks]
